name: siteverdict
description: SiteVerdict — national Site Check CI release system (package 92)

notes.netlify_cli: Not installed. End-to-end tests (test:sitecheck) require deployed site at BASE_URL.
notes.local_test: npm run predeploy runs static analysis only. Does not require network.
notes.e2e_test: npm run test:sitecheck runs Playwright against BASE_URL (default: siteverdict2.netlify.app)
notes.predeploy: npm run predeploy passes before push. Run test:sitecheck after Netlify deploy.
